title: Setting up my CRM to manage multiple publications and their advertisers.

posts.author: giesenk (Kathy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for assistance with setting up boards for multiple publications and their advertisers. My main objectives are:

· To create an individual board for each publication

· To organize an extensive client list across several publication boards

With this arrangement, I aim to easily track which clients are advertising in each magazine.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

This should be easy to set up creating automations and workflows if needed. Eg each publication board could be automatically created from a template on commencement

image783×578 50.2 KB

CRM is well set up for managing lots of clients. You can also have different workspaces to separate different business areas/ groups if needed.

if you want further support or a call let me know of DM!
